rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—I suppose the struggle is nearly over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0020
rows.name: I have been waiting, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0030
rows.name: for me, it was meaningless time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0040
rows.name: Well, my apologies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0050
rows.name: Then let's settle it quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0060
rows.name: In the end[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0070
rows.name: this struggle, too, was meaningless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0080
rows.name:
I thought that by fighting you, I
would be able to know what death is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0090
rows.name: But it was futile.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0100
rows.name:
Perhaps now I am no longer
even your enemy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0110
rows.name: Because the struggle itself is meaningless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0120
rows.name: At this point[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0130
rows.name: What the hell are you saying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0140
rows.name:
My home planet was destroyed
because of your scheme.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0150
rows.name: Emotionally, I do resent you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0160
rows.name:
However, now I have resolved to
fight with my own existence at stake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0170
rows.name: If you threaten our existence[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0175
rows.name: and obstruct our will to live[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0180
rows.name: then I will treat you as an enemy[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0185
rows.name:
and fight with everything
I have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0190
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0200
rows.name: So that is your definition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0210
rows.name: I do not understand it,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0215
rows.name: but I will memorize it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0220
rows.name: Why won't you even try to understand?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0230
rows.name:
With an intellect like yours, you
should easily be able to do so![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0240
rows.name:
It is not a question of
whether I can or cannot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0250
rows.name: I simply choose not to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0260
rows.name:
As I said, my actions are carried out
automatically by necessity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0270
rows.name: There is no necessity in understanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0280
rows.name: But there is necessity in knowing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0290
rows.name: I am the supreme intellect of Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0300
rows.name: Ignorance is not permissible for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0310
rows.name: Samaar, he said?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0320
rows.name: What is death[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0330
rows.name: Is it merely the price paid for defeat?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0340
rows.name:
Or does it mark
the end of existence?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0350
rows.name: Then what is existence, as you define it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0360
rows.name: You do not know[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0370
rows.name: You know absolutely nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0380
rows.name:
Not the abyss at the center of the entire
universe, where all consciousness accumulates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0390
rows.name:
You do not even know that the technology you use
to seal consciousness within artificial bodies[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0400
rows.name:
is nothing more than a simulated
recreation of that structure[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0410
rows.name: The abyss where consciousness is accumulated[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0420
rows.name: You mean, apart from the Central Life,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0430
rows.name:
there really is another source
for our consciousness[ST:wide ]—?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0440
rows.name:
The [System:Ruby rt=B.B. ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby] technology was merely
a simulated recreation of it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0450
rows.name: Does that mean the Central Life[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0460
rows.name: was nothing more than a relay point?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0470
rows.name: Coincidence exists in all things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0480
rows.name:
By pure chance, you managed to connect to
the abyss of this universe, if only in fragments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0490
rows.name: I will praise you for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0500
rows.name: That is precisely why you are so comical.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0520
rows.name:
Therefore, my interest in
you never runs out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0530
rows.name:
How do your meager intellects
comprehend it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0540
rows.name: Let me ask once more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0550
rows.name: What is death?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0560
rows.name: Death is not an end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0570
rows.name: That is correct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0580
rows.name:
It is only the cessation
of biological functions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0590
rows.name: Our existence remains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0600
rows.name: Existence is to live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0605
rows.name: It is the proof that you lived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0610
rows.name: Is that[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0620
rows.name: your definition?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0630
rows.name: It's not some mere definition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0640
rows.name: just how important that is,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0650
rows.name: we understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0660
rows.name: That's quite the confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0670
rows.name: However, understanding[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0675
rows.name: and accepting it is where you end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0680
rows.name: It is the defeat of your intellect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0690
rows.name: Only death remains there as the price.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0700
rows.name: Therefore[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0710
rows.name: I will never understand it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0720
rows.name: Pathetic[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0730
rows.name: To me, it just looks like you're running away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0740
rows.name: Indeed, I am constantly running away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0750
rows.name: I will continue to run for all eternity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0760
rows.name: Escaping is far more active than accepting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0770
rows.name: By continuing to run away,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0780
rows.name: I alone will make my existence victorious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0790
rows.name:
What meaning is there in an
existence that only runs away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0800
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0810
rows.name:
If you claim that death
is the price of defeat,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0820
rows.name: you are already dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0830
rows.name: You are a meaningless existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0840
rows.name: My existence is meaningless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0850
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0860
rows.name:
It doesn't matter how the
mechanics of the universe work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0870
rows.name:
This truth exists entirely
apart from such things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0880
rows.name: You are[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0890
rows.name:
what you will eternally
refuse to know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0900
rows.name: There is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0910
rows.name: nothing that I cannot know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0920
rows.name: You said it yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0930
rows.name: That itself is proof of your ignorance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0940
rows.name: You don't know that you don't know[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0950
rows.name: If you cannot accept that,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0960
rows.name: you have admitted defeat yourself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0970
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Unpleasant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0980
rows.name: I will give you death, claim victory,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33140100_MSG0990
rows.name: and then transcend this world.[ST:wait ]
